channel.title: NanoClip Updates
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 1.0.3
item.description:
What's New in 1.0.3

  • Bug fixes and improvements
  • - Fixed the picker visuals for transparent themes by removing the bad square outer stroke/shadow effect and improving the shortcuts companion panel background behavior.
  • - Clipboard items now move back to the top after paste, so the most recently pasted item becomes the first item in history again.
  • - Added a new free Clean theme with solid light/dark backgrounds for better readability.

item.title: Version 1.0.2
item.description:
What's New in 1.0.2

  • Bug fixes and improvements
  • - Polished DMG installer with drag-to-Applications layout
  • - Fixed Cmd+H obfuscation not updating the list in real time
  • - Fixed Cmd+Enter not copying snippet to clipboard in argument form
  • - Fixed selection highlight getting lost when navigating with arrow keys
  • - Fixed pinned items appearing under time group headers (Today, Yesterday, etc.)
  • - Fixed unpinned items appearing in wrong time group order
  • - App Store build now allows redeeming Polar.sh license keys

item.title: Version 1.0.1
item.description:
What's New in 1.0.1

  • NanoClip is a fast, lightweight clipboard manager that lives in your menu bar. Press Cmd+Option+V to instantly access everything you've ever copied — text, images, links, files, code, and colors.
  • CLIPBOARD HISTORY
  • Every copy is saved automatically. Search through your history instantly by typing, scroll back through time-grouped entries, and paste anything with a keystroke. Pin important items so they're always at the top.
  • SMART SNIPPETS
  • Save reusable text templates with dynamic placeholders. Create a snippet, assign a keyword like //sig, and type it in any app — it expands instantly. Snippets support custom arguments that you fill in before pasting.
  • EDIT IN PLACE
  • Press Cmd+E to edit any clipboard item inline. Fix a typo, tweak a URL, update a value — then paste the modified version. Your edits are saved to history.
  • SEQUENTIAL PASTE
  • Queue up multiple items and paste them one by one in order. Perfect for filling out forms, transferring data between apps, or batch-pasting a list of values.
  • RICH LINK PREVIEWS
  • Copied URLs automatically show titles, favicons, and preview images. Even works with bot-protected sites.
  • PERSONAL STATS
  • Track your clipboard habits with daily streaks, busiest hours, top apps, and content type breakdowns. See how you use your clipboard — visualized.
  • 19 THEMES & 14 FONTS
  • Choose from Catppuccin, Nord, Dracula, Tokyo Night, Cyberpunk, Synthwave '84, Liquid Glass, and more. Pick your favorite font — Inter, JetBrains Mono, Sora, and 11 others.
  • iCLOUD SYNC
  • Your clipboard history and snippets sync across all your Macs via iCloud. No accounts, no servers, no setup.
  • PRIVACY FIRST
  • Content obfuscation hides sensitive items like passwords and API keys. All data stays on your device (or your iCloud). We never see your clipboard.
  • KEYBOARD-FIRST DESIGN
  • Navigate, search, expand, edit, pin, queue, and paste — all without touching your mouse. Every action has a keyboard shortcut.
